# terrible_community_general_memset_zone_domain (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String) The API key obtained from the Memset control panel.
- `domain` (String) The zone domain name. Ensure this value has at most 250 characters.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `zone` (String) The zone to add the domain to (this must already exist).

### Optional

- `state` (String) Indicates desired state of resource.

### Read-Only

- `memset_api` (String) Domain info from the Memset API.
